title: foundation — broadcast channels
description: One platform-wide broadcast channel. Publishes health-status snapshots so platform-admin dashboards + ops tooling can render live liveness without polling. Registered by `FoundationServiceProvider::registerBroadcastChannels()`.

channels.name: platform.health
channels.description: Health aggregate + per-probe status updates. Every 5 minutes (via foundation:health-snapshot scheduled command) + on any HealthProbeFailed event (real-time push).
channels.authorize: PlatformUser with the `platform.health.view` permission (all Academorix ops staff by default)

notes: This is the ONLY broadcast channel foundation owns. Downstream modules own their own tenant-scoped channels (tenant.{id}.invitations, tenant.{id}.notifications, etc.).
The `HealthSnapshotUpdated` event is broadcast-only — no listeners subscribe on the server side; the payload is a snapshot of `HealthAggregator::current()`.
